name: A Simple Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Whisk the mixture with a rotary beater or wire whisk until well blended.
3. Alternatively, place the ingredients in a jar, seal tightly, and shake vigorously.
4. This dressing is ideal for lettuce and fresh tomatoes.
Many of the recipes in this collection did not include amounts or oven temperatures. I have typed them as they appear in the book, including any typos.
